response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack experience, strongly exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at Optilyz, plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq that maps cleanly to the role. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, and there is no explicit Kotlin experience, but the broad polyglot background (Java, TypeScript, D, C++, Python-adjacent) and demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS matching primary stack
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly aligns with the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing workshops, and open-source project ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed despite being primary stack components
Kotlin not mentioned in skills or employment history (Java present but dated)
Heavy investment in D-lang ecosystem may indicate preference for niche stacks over mainstream enterprise tooling
